query:
UPDATE services SET
  connectionId = CASE WHEN (connectionId IS NULL OR connectionId = '') THEN 'VBU312373' ELSE connectionId END,
  supplierName = 'Vocus',
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '; [Vocus Services Import] Vocus ID: VBU312373 | Service: Business Unlimited | RFS: 2023-09-14 | Contract End: 2025-09-13')
WHERE locationAddress LIKE '%Terrence%Brendale%'
  AND serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND (supplierName = 'Unknown' OR supplierName IS NULL OR supplierName = '')
LIMIT 1;
